evidence_summary: Round-230 stays inside the selected milestone-1 closeout-audit scope, types the last selected GraphOps type-only NodeRef seam, confirms the retained mixed NodeRef boundary is limited to binding-tree storage and ancestor or parent targets, leaves src-public and registration files unchanged, and passes git diff --check, focused binding and graph-op slices, and cabal build all && cabal test with 2564 examples and 0 failures. The milestone-1 completion signal is now satisfied, so closeout may remain status-only and move milestone-1 from in-progress to done.
